name: slugcase
must_detect_signals: pyproject.toml has a [project] table but NO [project.scripts] / console entry point
src/slugcase/__init__.py exports a public API via __all__ (slugify, is_slug)
type hints plus a py.typed marker signal a typed library
classifiers and keywords frame it as an importable text-processing package
expected_visual: no banner needed — a concise API-usage code block and badges (version, license, CI) carry it
notes: No CLI: the absence of a console_scripts/bin entry is the key disambiguator from the cli archetype. README should lead with import-and-call usage, not install-and-run.
